\tzpentry{ID5525}{Chemical Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5525 introduces Chemical Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \mu(\mathbf{x}) &= \mu_0\bigl[1+\varepsilon_\mu G(\mathbf{x})\bigr], \\ \mathbf{M}(\mathbf{x}) &= M_0\,h(G)\,\hat{\mathbf{t}}_{\mathrm{spiral}}. \end{align}
